Strictly Confidential – Internal Incident & MNPI Assessment – Huaxing River Energy Technology Co., Ltd. (issuer application pending with Lingnan Equity Exchange Growth Board); USCC: XXXXXXXXXXXX (withheld).
Prepared by Compliance; Contact: Ms. Lin Qiaoyun, Deputy CFO, lin.qy@huaxingriver.cn; Emergency: security@huaxingriver.cn.
Summary of event: On 2026-06-03, our OT monitoring flagged lateral movement from a compromised maintenance laptop to the data staging server used for the “Project Mangrove” digital carbon asset pilot.
Indicators show exfiltration of a compressed archive containing draft ESG audit workpapers, a supplier price addendum for Q3 blades at a 7.5% conditional discount, and a wallet keystore used in the sandbox DCA token tests.
No resident ID numbers or bank accounts are included in this report; HR payroll spreadsheets present in the same share contain resident ID fields and two entries flagged as minors, which triggers PIPL sensitive PI handling if confirmed.
As an applicant issuer, this incident involves potential inside information: the tokenization pilot schedule and commercial terms of the green equipment supply, neither of which has been publicly disclosed.
Immediate actions: activated the information barrier for “Project Mangrove,” moved analysis to a clean team in the Legal‑IT enclave, and imposed a trading blackout window for all insiders from 2026‑06‑03 until a board‑approved disclosure.
Insider list updated (restricted): Ms. Lin Qiaoyun (Deputy CFO), Mr. Zhao Han (Head of Digital Security), Dr. Wei Lanting (ESG Director), and eight engineers seconded to the DCA sandbox; do not tip or selectively disclose.
We engaged a cross‑border SOC vendor in Haihua Free Trade Zone; any transfer of logs offshore will follow PIPL/CSL/DSL and require filing with the Municipal Cyberspace Administration Commission before export.
Issuer disclosure approach: prepare a factual cyber incident note and, if the supplier discount is deemed material, coordinate pre‑announcement with the Growth Board reviewer to avoid selective disclosure risk.
Subtle risk noted: the marketing draft for the “green token” launch page mentions “pre‑sale,” which could be interpreted as a timing signal for our DCA pilot if published before formal approval.
By contrast, the ESG marketing team may continue general education on climate methodology and token design mockups, provided they include no pricing, listing venue, or schedule references.
Operational containment: the affected keystore has been rotated, all sandbox wallets are paused, and OT network segmentation was tightened; production turbines remain unaffected and continue normal output.
HR reminder: staff must not forward incident artifacts to personal email; employment workflows involving background checks should redact resident ID fields at source and store USCC copies in the sealed archive.
For questions or to report potential leaks, contact compliance@huaxingriver.cn or the 24h hotline +86‑0000‑000‑000; do not discuss this matter with suppliers or prospective investors until the authorized notice is filed.
This memo includes a short training annex on information barriers and blackout windows for general awareness only and does not itself announce any issuance or listing plans.
